recentHighlights: Persistence of Vision (S2E08) — the Bothan as Hollow Deceptive Frame telepathically isolating the crew by offering them what they most want. Kes as mirror-conductor: her empathic reach becomes the key to seeing through the frame, because she can feel the shape of what the crew is actually experiencing vs. what the Bothan projects.

Parturition (S2E07) — the hatchling as suture conductor between Paris and Neelix. Two dead eggs, one alive: most frameworks don't survive from intuition to articulation, but the stillbirths create the pressure the third needs.

Twisted (S2E06) — the spatial distortion ring as pure process: not a threat to be solved but a passage to be held through. Sustained Hold in action: Chakotay's command while Janeway is trapped belowdecks.
